report.summary: Day 70 cycle v5: No new commits or deploys. Working tree drift worsened to 1,145 files (up from 650). Git locks now 7 days old — still the single blocker. 42 TS errors in 2 files, masked by ignoreBuildErrors. All 6 API route files present with cache headers. Rate limiter and defi-yields fallback still unwired (38+ cycles).

sections.title: QA Tester
items: LIVE SITE CHECK: Egress blocked from sandbox — unable to verify HTTP status codes this cycle. No regressions expected (0 commits since last check).
PUBLISHED SLUGS: 432 total in published-pages.ts (+1 from v4 cycle's 431).
PAGE AUDIT: 103/430 published slugs lack a dedicated page.tsx. Most are learn/* pages served via dynamic [slug] route — this is expected architecture. Compare/exchanges hub also uses index page.tsx.

TYPESCRIPT ERRORS: 42 errors across 2 files — src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (40 errors, JSX-in-TS syntax issue) and src/app/learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (2 errors, unescaped > in JSX).
BUILD SAFETY NET: ignoreBuildErrors:true still active in next.config.ts — masking all 42 TS errors. Build will succeed but type safety is compromised.
CARRY-OVER: /learn/smart-contract-security-guide + /learn/onchain-identity-guide still missing SEO components.
NO NEW REGRESSIONS this cycle (no code changes).

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: ALL 6 API ROUTE FILES PRESENT: prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields — all have route.ts files with cache headers.
CACHE CONFIGURATION: All 6 core routes + health + news-rss + cache-stats have stale-while-revalidate headers configured.
LIVE API VERIFICATION: Egress blocked — cannot confirm runtime health this cycle. Last verified healthy in v4 cycle.
RATE LIMITER: Library exists at src/lib/rate-limiter.ts + src/lib/api-cache.ts but STILL NOT wired into any of the 6 core API routes. Flagged 38+ cycles.
DEFI-YIELDS FALLBACK: Still 0 fallback data references in defi-yields route.ts. Flagged 38+ cycles.
X-Cache-Source header coverage unchanged from last cycle.

sections.title: DevOps
items: PRODUCTION: Still running commit e999560 ('promote 2 pages to production Day 62'), deployed Mar 17. No new deploys.
GIT LOCKS PERSIST [P0]: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16 11:17) + .git/index.lock (Mar 16 13:06) — now 7 days old. All commits and pushes blocked.
WORKING TREE DRIFT WORSENED: 1,145 uncommitted files (1,098 untracked + 47 modified). UP from 650 in v4 cycle — 495 additional files accumulated.
VERCEL PROJECT: Configured (prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75). Cannot verify deployment panel status (egress blocked).
BLOCKER [P0]: Git locks must be removed: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock. This is the single point of failure preventing all code from shipping.
WARNING: Previous cycle flagged Vercel '2 days left' — may have expired. Needs Jefe's verification.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 0 commits, 0 deploys. No code changes since Mar 17 (6 days).
LOCAL DRIFT: 1,145 files accumulated locally (up 76% from 650 last cycle). Includes learn guides, API routes, compare pages, review pages, tool pages across multiple verticals.
BLOCKER [P0]: Git locks — 7 days and counting. Resolution is a single command but requires manual intervention.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 2 learn pages missing SEO components (smart-contract-security, onchain-identity).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: defi-yields fallback data (38+ cycles unfixed).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter not wired to core API routes (38+ cycles unfixed).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: ignoreBuildErrors:true masking 42 TS errors in 2 files.
NEXT STEPS: (1) Remove git locks, (2) stage + commit 1,145 files, (3) push to trigger Vercel build, (4) fix 42 TS errors and disable ignoreBuildErrors.
